bulletSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use for this bullet.

emitEntityType.Wiki: The generation type used for this bullet.

emitteType.Wiki: The source type used for this bullet.

netSync.Wiki: The sync type used for this bullet in multiplayer.

enableAutoHoming.Wiki: If enabled, auto-homing is active for this bullet.

shootOffsetY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

shootOffsetX.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

shootOffsetZ.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

shootAngle.Wiki: The rotation offset on the y-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

shootAngleXZ.Wiki: The rotation offset on the x-axis and z-axis that is applied during bullet generation.

upDownCorrectAngle.Wiki: The correction to apply up/down to the bullet's rotation.

rightleftCorrectAngle.Wiki: The correction to apply left/right to the bullet's rotation.

upDownAccuracy.Wiki: The accuracy to apply to the up/down rotation.

rightLeftAccuracy.Wiki: The accuracy to apply to the left/right rotation.

upDownEstimateFuture.Wiki: If enabled, predict the next up/down position of the bullet.

rightLeftEstimateFuture.Wiki: If enabled, predict the next left/right position of the bullet.

simultaneouslyNum.Wiki: The maximum number of simultaneous instances of this bullet.

automaticShootNum.Wiki: The number of continuous shots for this bullet.

simultaneouslyAngleY.Wiki: The angle increment on the y-axis for each simultaneous bullet.

simultaneouslyAngleXZ.Wiki: The angle increment on the x-axis and z-axis for each simultaneous bullet.

automaticInterval.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) between each continuous shot.

automaticAngleY.Wiki: The angle increment on the y-axis for each continuous bullet.

automaticAngleXZ.Wiki: The angle increment on the x-axis and z-axis for each continuous bullet.

simultaneouslyLoopMax.AltName: Simultaneous Shot: Max Dummy Polygon ID
simultaneouslyLoopMax.Wiki: The maximum dummy polygon ID to increment up to during a simultaneous shot.

automaticLoopMax.AltName: Continuous Shot: Max Dummy Polygon ID
automaticLoopMax.Wiki: The maximum dummy polygon ID to increment up to during a continuous shot.

enableSimultaneouslyMuzzleFlash.Wiki: If enabled, simultaneous shot may produce muzzle flash.

enableAutomaticMuzzleFlash.Wiki: If enabled, simultaneous shot may produce continuous flash.

bulletLife.Wiki: The life duration of the bullet (in seconds). Once this is reached, the bullet expires.

initialVelocity.Wiki: The initial velocity of the bullet (in metres per second).

acceleStartTime.Wiki: The duration before acceleration begins for the bullet (in seconds).

acceleration.Wiki: The acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second, up to the max speed.

maxSpeed.Wiki: The maximum speed of the bullet (in metres per second).

downStartTime.Wiki: The duration before drop-off begins for the bullet (in seconds).

gravityValue.Wiki: The gravity applied to the bullet during its drop-off.

updownRotateSpeed.Wiki: The initial speed for any vertical rotation the bullet undergoes (in metres per second).

updownRotateStartTime.Wiki: The duration before vertical rotation begins to apply to the bullet (in seconds).

updownRotateAccel.Wiki: The rotational acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second during vertical rotation, up to the max rotation.

updownRotateMaxAngle.Wiki: The maximum vertical rotational speed the bullet can reach (in metres per second).

leftrightRotateSpeed.Wiki: The initial speed for any horizontal rotation the bullet undergoes (in metres per second).

leftrightRotateStartTime.Wiki: The duration before horizontal rotation begins to apply to the bullet (in seconds).

leftrightRotateAccel.Wiki: The rotational acceleration (in metres per second) to apply to the bullet each second during horizontal rotation, up to the max rotation.

leftrightRotateMaxAngle.Wiki: The maximum horizontal rotational speed the bullet can reach (in metres per second).

homingUDType.Wiki: The homing type to use for vertical tracking.

homingLRType.Wiki: The homing type to use for horizontal tracking.

homingStopDistance.Wiki: The distance (in metres) after which tracking stops.

homingStopAngle.Wiki: The rotation (in degrees) after which tracking stops.

homingAngle.Wiki: The rotation (in degrees) to apply during tracking.

homingOffDisableTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) after which tracking is disabled.

homingStartTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) after which tracking is enabled.

quickCorrectTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) before quick correction occurs for this bullet.

quickCorrectUDAngle.Wiki: The vertical rotation to apply during quick correction.

quickCorrectLRAngle.Wiki: The horizontal rotation to apply during quick correction.

penetration.Wiki: The penetration type to use against characters for this bullet.

penetrationMap.Wiki: The penetration type to use against map pieces for this bullet.

penetrationObj.Wiki: The penetration type to use against objects for this bullet.

penetrationWater.Wiki: The penetration type to use against water for this bullet.

muzzleFlashSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use for the muzzle flash produced by this bullet.

isSfxEraseRoot.Wiki: If enabled, the SFX for the bullet is immediately deleted when it expires.

isDefenderHitNetSync.Wiki: If enabled, the bullet makes a hit decision for the defender.

explosionOffsetUpDown.Wiki: The position correction for impacts (explosions) on the vertical axis.

explosionOffsetRightLeft.Wiki: The position correction for impacts (explosions) on the horizontal axis.

explosionSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use for impacts from this bullet.

attachSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use for piercing particles from this bullet.

attachLife.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) of piercing particles.

attachOffset.Wiki: The depth offset (in metres) of piercing particles.

attachParam.Wiki: The piercing generation type to use for this bullet.

isAttachDisableBulletDir.Wiki: If enabled, direction is ignored upon piercing.

explosionForceUp.Wiki: If enabled, bullet impact is forced upwards.

isDeleteEqualBulletId.Wiki: If multiple bullets of the same ID exist, delete existing ones when this bullet is generated.

childeBulletId.Wiki: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

childeDamageId.Wiki: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

childeBulletId02.Wiki: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

childeDamageId02.Wiki: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

childeBulletId03.Wiki: The bullet ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

childeDamageId03.Wiki: The damage ID of a child bullet from this bullet.

isChildeExplosion.Wiki: If enabled, child bullets are considered explosions.

isChildeLife.Wiki: If enabled, child bullets inherit this bullet's life duration.

isChildeContinue.Wiki: If enabled, this bullet will emit child bullets at regular intervals.

childeAreaRange.Wiki: The judgment distance of child bullets.

childeAreaUDAngle.Wiki: The judgement rotation of child bullets on the vertical axis.

childeAreaLRAngle.Wiki: The judgement rotation of child bullets on the horizontal axis.

childeDelay.Wiki: The delay duration for child bullets.

decalId.Wiki: The decal that is pasted to the surface this bullet touches.

isSpellParry.Wiki: If enabled, this bullet can be spell parried.

isSpellParryNoDamageThrough.Wiki: If enabled, this bullet can be spell parried, but damage still occurs.

onDamageType.Wiki: The damage type applied when this bullet touches a surface.

hitbackType.Wiki: The hit back type applied when this bullet is repulsed.

spellParryAngleX.Wiki: The angle on the x-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

spellParryAngleY.Wiki: The angle on the y-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

spellParryAngleZ.Wiki: The angle on the z-axis the bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

hitbackSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use when this bullet is repulsed (via spell parry).

parryAngleAccuracyX.Wiki: The repulsion accuracy for the x-axis angle.

parryAngleAccuracyY.Wiki: The repulsion accuracy for the y-axis angle.

parryAngleAccuracyZ.Wiki: The repulsion accuracy for the z-axis angle.

parryAccelSpeed.Wiki: The acceleration added to the repulsed bullet.

childeInterval.Wiki: The interval (in seconds) that a child bullet is emitted at.

homingStopTargetDistance.Wiki: The distance (in metres) from lock-on target after which tracking stops.
